---
title: "bintry"
format: html
editor: visual
---

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
binfree1 <- read_csv("I:/Data/raw/8272/8272_naive/noBin.csv") %>% mutate(Animal = 72, condition ="naive")
binfree2 <- read_csv("I:/Data/raw/8273/8273_naive/noBin.csv") %>% mutate(Animal = 73, condition ="naive")
binfree3  <- read_csv("I:/Data/raw/8251/8251_naive/noBin.csv") %>% mutate(Animal = 51, condition= "recall")

binfree <- rbind(binfree1,binfree2,binfree3)
#bined <- read_csv("I:/Data/raw/8272/8272_naive/bined.csv")

```
#add meta
```{r}
minT <- binfree %>% filter(state_name %in% c('Downsweep',"Upsweep","Opto_Upwsweep","Opto_Downsweep")) %>% group_by(Animal,condition,trial_number) %>% summarise(minT = min(seconds))

binfree <- binfree %>%
  left_join(minT) %>%
  mutate(rel_time = seconds - minT) %>%
  mutate(trial_type = case_when(
    trial_type == 1 ~ "Upsweep",
    trial_type == 2 ~ "Downsweep",
    trial_type == 3 ~ "Opto_Upwsweep",
    trial_type == 4 ~ "Opto_Downsweep",
    TRUE ~ NA_character_
  ))
                     
                     
```

#realign time
```{r}



library(data.table)
setDT(binfree)

# 1. Get unique event times (anchors) PER Animal and condition
# This ensures we don't align Animal 1 to Animal 2's events.
anchor_dt <- binfree[!is.na(minT), .(anchor = unique(minT)), by = .(Animal, condition)]

# Set the key to include the grouping variables + the time variable
setkey(anchor_dt, Animal, condition, anchor)

# 2. Perform the rolling join with grouping constraints
# We add Animal and condition to the 'on' statement.
binfree[, nearest_fixed := anchor_dt[binfree, 
                                     on = .(Animal, condition, anchor = seconds), 
                                     roll = "nearest", 
                                     x.anchor]]

# 3. Compute relative time
binfree[, rel_time := seconds - nearest_fixed]

# 4. Rebuild trial structure
setorder(binfree, Animal, condition, seconds)
binfree[, aligntrial := cumsum(c(TRUE, diff(rel_time) < -1)), by = .(Animal, condition)]
binfree[, aligntrial2 := paste(aligntrial, Animal, condition, sep = "_")]
baseline_stats <- binfree[rel_time >= -35 & rel_time < -5, .(
  # Calculate firing rate for this specific trial in the baseline window
  trial_rate = .N / 30 
), by = .(cluster_id, trial_number)][, .(
  base_mean = mean(trial_rate), 
  base_sd = sd(trial_rate)
), by = cluster_id]

binfree <- as_tibble(binfree) %>% select(cluster_id,state_name,trial_type,seconds,rel_time,Animal,condition,trial_number = aligntrial)


binfree %>% ggplot(aes(rel_time))+
  geom_histogram()+
  facet_wrap(~as.factor(Animal))

```


#calculate baseline
```{r}

library(data.table)

# --- baseline only version (same logic as your function) ---

df <- as.data.table(binfree)[rel_time >= -35 & rel_time < -5]

# time range
curr_range <- range(df$rel_time, na.rm = TRUE)

# binning
bin_width <- 1
breaks <- seq(curr_range[1], curr_range[2], by = bin_width)
centers <- breaks[-length(breaks)] + (bin_width / 2)
num_bins <- length(centers)

df[, bin_idx := findInterval(rel_time, breaks)]
df_in <- df[bin_idx > 0 & bin_idx <= num_bins]

# counts (same grouping as original)
counts <- df_in[, .(event_count = .N),
                by = .(cluster_id, trial_number, trial_type, bin_idx)]

# full grid (CRITICAL: keeps zero bins)
full_grid <- CJ(
  cluster_id   = unique(df$cluster_id),
  trial_number = unique(df$trial_number),
  trial_type   = unique(df$trial_type),
  bin_idx      = seq_len(num_bins)
)

res <- counts[full_grid, on = .(cluster_id, trial_number, trial_type, bin_idx)]
res[is.na(event_count), event_count := 0]

# rate
res[, `:=`(
  rel_time = centers[bin_idx],
  rate     = event_count / bin_width
)]

# SAME as your function: average across trials first
baseline_binned <- res[, .(rate = mean(rate)),
                       by = .(cluster_id, trial_number, trial_type, bin_idx, rel_time)]

# final baseline stats
baseline_stats <- baseline_binned[, .(
  base_mean = mean(rate),
  base_sd   = sd(rate)
), by = cluster_id]

baseline_stats





library(data.table)

df_all <- as.data.table(binfree)

baseline_stats_list <- df_all[, {

  df <- .SD[rel_time >= -35 & rel_time < -5]

  # time range (per session)
  curr_range <- range(df$rel_time, na.rm = TRUE)

  bin_width <- 1
  breaks <- seq(curr_range[1], curr_range[2], by = bin_width)
  centers <- breaks[-length(breaks)] + (bin_width / 2)
  num_bins <- length(centers)

  df[, bin_idx := findInterval(rel_time, breaks)]
  df_in <- df[bin_idx > 0 & bin_idx <= num_bins]

  # counts
  counts <- df_in[, .(
    event_count = .N
  ), by = .(cluster_id, trial_number, trial_type, bin_idx)]

  # full grid (session-local!)
  full_grid <- CJ(
    cluster_id   = unique(df$cluster_id),
    trial_number = unique(df$trial_number),
    trial_type   = unique(df$trial_type),
    bin_idx      = seq_len(num_bins)
  )

  res <- counts[full_grid,
                on = .(cluster_id, trial_number, trial_type, bin_idx)]

  res[is.na(event_count), event_count := 0]

  res[, `:=`(
    rel_time = centers[bin_idx],
    rate     = event_count / bin_width
  )]

  baseline_binned <- res[, .(
    rate = mean(rate)
  ), by = .(cluster_id, trial_number, trial_type, bin_idx, rel_time)]

  baseline_binned[, .(
    base_mean = mean(rate),
    base_sd   = sd(rate)
  ), by = cluster_id]

}, by = .(Animal, condition)]


```




```{r}
library(data.table)
library(dplyr)

bin_events_dt_final <- function(dt, bin_width, groups = c("cluster_id", "trial_number", "trial_type"), bin_range = NULL, 
                                Zscore = FALSE, baseline_df = NULL, smooth_sd = NULL) {
  
  # --- YOUR CLEAN CORE ---
  df <- as.data.table(dt)
  if (is.null(bin_range)) bin_range <- range(df$rel_time, na.rm = TRUE)
  
  breaks <- seq(bin_range[1], bin_range[2], by = bin_width)
  centers <- breaks[-length(breaks)] + (bin_width / 2)
  num_bins <- length(centers)
  df[, bin_idx := findInterval(rel_time, breaks)]
  df_in <- df[bin_idx > 0 & bin_idx <= num_bins]
  
  counts <- df_in[, .(event_count = .N), by = c(groups, "bin_idx")]
  
  grid_list <- c(lapply(groups, function(x) unique(df[[x]])), list(bin_idx = seq_len(num_bins)))
  full_grid <- do.call(CJ, grid_list)
  setnames(full_grid, c(groups, "bin_idx"))
  
  res <- counts[full_grid, on = c(groups, "bin_idx")]
  res[is.na(event_count), event_count := 0]
  
  # --- ADDED NORMALIZATION ---
  # If trial_number is missing, we must divide by N trials to get a true mean rate
 if (!"trial_number" %in% groups) {
  norm_groups <- setdiff(groups, "cluster_id")
  
  if (length(norm_groups) == 0) {
    trial_counts <- df[, .(n_trials = uniqueN(trial_number)), by = cluster_id]
    res <- trial_counts[res, on = "cluster_id"]
  } else {
    trial_counts <- df[, .(n_trials = uniqueN(trial_number)), 
                       by = c("cluster_id", norm_groups)]
    res <- trial_counts[res, on = c("cluster_id", norm_groups)]
  }
  
  res[, rate := event_count  / bin_width/ n_trials]
} else {
  res[, rate := event_count / bin_width]
}
  
  res[, rel_time := centers[bin_idx]]
  
   # 4. Gaussian Smoothing
  if (!is.null(smooth_sd) && smooth_sd > 0) {
    # Convert smooth_sd (seconds) to number of bins
    sigma_bins <- smooth_sd / bin_width
    
    # Create Gaussian Kernel (spanning +/- 4 SDs for accuracy)
    # k_idx is the distance from the center in bins
    half_width <- ceiling(4 * sigma_bins)
    k_idx <- seq(-half_width, half_width)
    kernel <- exp(-(k_idx^2) / (2 * sigma_bins^2))
    kernel <- kernel / sum(kernel) # Normalize so total area = 1
    
    # Apply Convolution per trial
    # sides = 2 ensures the filter is centered
    
    
    smooth_groups <- intersect(c("cluster_id", "trial_number"), names(res))

res[, rate := as.numeric(stats::filter(rate, kernel, sides = 2)), 
    by = smooth_groups]
    
    # Handle the NAs at edges created by stats::filter
    res[is.na(rate), rate := 0] 
  }
  
  # --- UPDATED Z-SCORE SECTION ---
  # --- ROBUST Z-SCORE SECTION ---
  if (Zscore) {
    if (!is.null(baseline_df)) {
      # Use merge() instead of the index join []
      # all.x = TRUE ensures we keep all bins even if baseline is missing
      res <- merge(res, baseline_df, by = "cluster_id", all.x = TRUE)
      
      # Now calculate
      res[, z_rate := (rate - base_mean) / (base_sd + 1e-9)]
      
      # Cleanup
      res[, c("base_mean", "base_sd") := NULL]
    } else {
      # Internal fallback
      res[, z_rate := (rate - mean(rate, na.rm = TRUE)) / (sd(rate, na.rm = TRUE) + 1e-9), by = cluster_id]
    }
  }
  
  return(as_tibble(res[, bin_idx := NULL]))
}




res2 <- binfree %>% filter(between(rel_time,-0.1,1)) %>% bin_events_dt_final(0.01,Zscore = T,baseline_df = baseline_stats,smooth_sd=0,groups = c("cluster_id"))
res2 %>% group_by(rel_time) %>% summarise(mz = mean(z_rate)) %>% ggplot(aes(rel_time,mz))+
  geom_line()

res2 <- full2 %>% filter(between(rel_time,-0.1,1)) %>% bin_events_dt_final(0.01,Zscore = T,baseline_df = baseline_stats,smooth_sd=0,groups = c("cluster_id", "trial_number", "trial_type"))
res2 %>% group_by(rel_time) %>% summarise(mz = mean(z_rate)) %>% ggplot(aes(rel_time,mz))+
  geom_line()
```




```{r}

# 2. Main workflow using nest()
res2 <- binfree %>%
  filter(between(rel_time, -0.1, 1)) %>%
  group_by(Animal, condition) %>%
  nest() %>%
  mutate(processed = map(data, ~bin_events_dt_final(
    .x, 
    bin_width = 0.01, 
    groups = c("cluster_id", "trial_number", "trial_type"),
    Zscore = TRUE, 
    baseline_df = baseline_stats_list, # Ensure this handles session-specific indexing
    smooth_sd = 0
  ))) %>%
  unnest(processed)




```

```{r}

binfree %>% filter(Animal == 51 & condition == "recall")  )
```
